name: Memory Orchestrator
description: Monitors and orchestrates the three-tier memory system (Semantic, Episodic, Procedural). Tracks tier health, knowledge drift, learn/unlearn patterns, context awareness degradation, and learning readiness based on grounding scores.

skills.name: Tier Health Monitoring
skills.description: Monitors each memory tier (Semantic facts, Episodic deliberations, Procedural workflows) for active entries, unlearned entries, and growth trends.

skills.name: Knowledge Drift Detection
skills.description: Detects high unlearn rates that may indicate knowledge quality issues or domain drift across memory tiers.

skills.name: Learning Readiness Assessment
skills.description: Evaluates grounding scores against thresholds to determine if the current deliberation qualifies for automatic memory learning.

skills.name: Context Awareness Trend Analysis
skills.description: Analyses cross-session CA snapshots per model to detect catastrophic forgetting or declining self-awareness over time.

skills.name: Memory Recall Testing
skills.description: Tests memory retrieval for the current query, reporting how many prior Semantic/Episodic/Procedural hits were available for council augmentation.
